auth.tagline: Identify unknown calls and block spam with the power of community.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: This starter app includes example code to help you get started.
explore.routingDesc: This app has two screens: src/app/index.tsx and src/app/explore.tsx
explore.layoutDesc: The layout file in src/app/_layout.tsx sets up the tab navigator.
explore.platformSupportDesc: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and the web. To open the web version, press w in the terminal running this project.
explore.imagesDesc: For static images, you can use the @2x and @3x suffixes to provide files for different screen densities.
explore.minDigitsHint: Enter at least 11 digits to search

home.dashboardDesc: Welcome to your personalized caller ID dashboard.

contacts.syncDesc: Syncing your contacts helps us identify unknown callers for everyone. We respect your privacy and don't share your data.
contacts.permissionReason: We need contact access to identify unknown callers.
contacts.tagHint: A tag will be added to selected contacts.
